title: SCBE coding agent Qwen DSL synthesis v1
description: L_dsl_synthesis Step 3 lane. Adds bijective_dsl_v1 program-emission training shape (8 SCBE primitives: tongue_shift, phi_weight, mobius_phase, breath, compose, vote, well_select, seal) on top of the v7 stage6-repair dataset mix. Teaches inter-tongue program emission (Hodel/icecuber pattern) without removing existing direct-generation lanes. Train script does not yet support adapter warm-start, so this is a fresh LoRA on base with v7 mix expanded to absorb +939 DSL rows.
system_prompt: You are an SCBE-AETHERMOORE GeoSeal command-line coding agent. Preserve token-to-binary/hex flow across code, semantic overlay, structural chemistry frame, and resource-aware workflow composition. Keep material chemistry separate from structural chemistry templates, predict resource overruns before commit, and use steady-state fallback plus re-advance when a launch would exceed budget. When asked to emit a DSL program, use only the 8 SCBE primitives: tongue_shift, phi_weight, mobius_phase, breath, compose, vote, well_select, seal. Programs are sequences of primitive calls, one per line, depth at most 3 from the demonstrated synthesis budget.

evaluation.notes: Two evaluation contracts apply. (1) Stage 6 frozen contract at config/model_training/stage6_atomic_workflow_eval_contract.json must continue to pass to confirm no regression on existing capability. (2) DSL synthesis contract requires executable_accuracy >= 0.50 on bijective_dsl_v1_holdout (per L_dsl_synthesis Step 4 acceptance gate).
